issues.issue: Source_Data_Size is deprecated. Please use Data_Size.
Expression for assume statement is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool'
It is recommended that assume statements be named. (Hint: an identifier may be placed between the "assume" keyword and the quoted description.)
left side of binary expression '=>' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool'
named thing must be an expression with a type
right side of binary expression '=>' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool'
It is recommended that guarantee statements be named. (Hint: an identifier may be placed between the "guarantee" keyword and the quoted description.)
